default.description: Architected a multi-cloud foundation across GCP, AWS, and Azure, establishing SRE practices and IaC-driven infrastructure governance at enterprise scale.
default.challenge: Saturated data centers and legacy infrastructure constrained scalability, speed-to-market, and operational resilience.
default.solution: Achieved faster IT environment provisioning, enterprise-scale infrastructure elasticity, and dramatically improved system uptime — replacing legacy constraints with cloud-native resilience and business continuity.

default.description: Delivered an event-driven, ML-powered fraud detection platform processing 4,000+ transactions per second, reducing annual fraud losses by over $10M.
default.challenge: Combat increasingly sophisticated fraud at scale while migrating 50TB of legacy data without disrupting live processing for 40M+ active cardholders.
default.solution: Achieved >$10M annual fraud reduction, 42% faster case resolution, and >90% alert accuracy by deploying real-time streaming and ML scoring.
